description_for_human: Clinical AI for dysphagia and 照護食 care food — IDDSI classification, aspiration screening, clinical Q&A, and recipe adaptation for Hong Kong care settings.
description_for_model: CareEZ provides clinical decision support APIs for dysphagia management and 照護食 (care food) standard adoption. Endpoints: iddsi-classify (IDDSI texture level classification), voice-aspiration-screen (aspiration risk from voice descriptors, beta), clinical-qa (clinical Q&A on IDDSI/HKCSS standards), recipe-modify (recipe adaptation to target IDDSI level). All endpoints POST application/json at https://www.seniordeli.com/api/<endpoint>.
